from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel

class UserResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    role: str

app = FastAPI()

@app.get("/users/{user_id}", response_model=UserResponse)
def get_user(user_id: int):
    # Correct: return a Pydantic model so the schema is correctly documented in OpenAPI
    return UserResponse(id=user_id, name="Alice", role="admin")
